name: vinayak-chiluka-profile
description: Personal profile site for Vinayak Chiluka

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -av --exclude=dist --exclude=node_modules --exclude=.git --exclude='.*' . dist/ 2>/dev/null || (cp -R css js assets constants projects dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp *.html *.md CNAME dist/ 2>/dev/null; true)
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use GitHub Actions or gh-pages for deployment'
